debug_info.goal:
pbar : Pose
ε : ℝ
poly : GoodPoly
pc : GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition poly pbar ε
P : Euc(3)
⊢ ‖P‖ * nth_partial 0 (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer pbar ε poly P pc) pbar.outerParams =
    inner ℝ (pbar.rotM₂θ P) (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.w poly pbar ε pc)

failed_attempts:
simpa [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit] using
    (partials_helper0 (pbar := pbar) (ε := ε) (poly := poly)
      (pc := (by
        classical
        exact
          { S := P
            S_in_poly := by
              simpa using pc.S_in_poly
            w := pc.w
            w_unit := pc.w_unit
            exceeds := pc.exceeds }))

have hP : ‖P‖ = 0 ∨ ‖P‖ ≠ 0 := eq_or_ne ‖P‖ 0
  rcases hP with hP0 | hPne
  · simp [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, hP0]
  ·
    have hdiv :
        nth_partial 0 (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams =
          ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ / ‖P‖ := by
      sorry
    have : ‖P‖ * (⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ / ‖P‖) = ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ := by
      field_simp [hPne]
    simpa [hdiv] using this
simp [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, nth_partial]

simp [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, nth_partial]
  have hP : ‖P‖ ≠ 0 := by
    simpa using (pc.norm_S_ne_zero : (0 : ℝ) ≠ ‖pc.S‖)
  field_simp [hP]

simpa [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, nth_partial, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm,
    mul_comm, div_eq_mul_inv] using (partials_helper0 (pbar := pbar) (ε := ε) (poly := poly)
      (pc := (by
        classical
        exact
        { S := P
          S_in_poly := by
            simpa using pc.S_in_poly
          w := pc.w
          w_unit := pc.w_unit
          exceeds := pc.exceeds }))

have hP : ‖P‖ = 0 ∨ ‖P‖ ≠ 0 := eq_or_ne ‖P‖ 0
  rcases hP with hP0 | hPne
  · have : P = 0 := by simpa [norm_eq_zero] using hP0
    subst this
    simp [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, nth_partial]
  · have hf : DifferentiableAt ℝ (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams := by
      have : Differentiable ℝ (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) := by
        unfold GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer rotproj_outer_unit
        refine Differentiable.div ?_ differentiable_const (by simpa using hPne)
        simp [rotM, rotM_mat, inner, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail]
        fun_prop
      exact this.differentiableAt
    have hder :
        fderiv ℝ (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1) =
          ‖P‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ := by
      have :
          HasFDerivAt (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc)
            (‖P‖⁻¹ • (InnerProductSpace.toDual ℝ ℝ² pc.w |>.toLinearMap).comp
                (pbar.rotM₂θCLM P))
            pbar.outerParams := by
        sorry
      simpa [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit] using this.fderiv
    have : ‖P‖ * nth_partial 0 (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams =
        ‖P‖ * (‖P‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫) := by
      simp [nth_partial, hder]
    simp [this, hPne, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]

simpa [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, nth_partial, rotM] using
    (partials_helper0 (pbar := pbar) (ε := ε) (poly := poly) (pc := pc))

classical
  have hP : ‖P‖ ≠ 0 := by
    have : 0 < ‖P‖ := poly.nontriv P (by
      simpa using (pc.S_in_poly : pc.S ∈ poly.vertices))
    exact ne_of_gt this
  have hf : DifferentiableAt ℝ (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams := by
    have : ContDiff ℝ 2 (rotproj_outer_unit P pc.w) := by
      refine rotation_partials_exist_outer (S := P) ?_
      exact lt_of_le_of_ne (norm_nonneg P) (Ne.symm hP)
    exact this.differentiableAt (by omega)
  have hfd :
      (HasFDerivAt (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc)
        ((‖P‖)⁻¹ • (EuclideanSpace.basisFun (Fin 2) ℝ |>.toBasis.constr ℝ
          ![⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫, ⟪pbar.rotM₂φ P, pc.w⟫] |>.toContinuousLinearMap))
        pbar.outerParams) := by
    sorry
  have := (hfd.fderiv)
  simp only [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer] at *
  have : (fderiv ℝ (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams)
        (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1) =
      (‖P‖)⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ := by
    have := congrArg (fun (T : (ℝ² →L[ℝ] ℝ)) => T (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1)) this
    simp [EuclideanSpace.basisFun_apply, Fin.isValue] at this
    simpa [smul_eq_mul, mul_assoc] using this
  field_simp [this, hP]

have h := (rotation_partials_bounded_outer (S := P) (w := pc.w) (w_unit := pc.w_unit) pbar.outerParams)
  -- use the explicit `fu_pose_eq_outer` identity and the already-established inner-case pattern
  simpa [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer] using (by
    -- same calculation as `partials_helper0`, but for `outer`
    have hne : (0 : ℝ) ≠ ‖P‖ := by
      by_cases hP : ‖P‖ = 0
      · exact (by simpa [hP] using (by rfl : (0:ℝ) ≠ 0))
      · exact hP
    -- rewrite `fu_outer` as scaled version of the un-normalized function
    -- and compute the partial using linearity of derivative
    have hf : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun x : ℝ² => ⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫) pbar.outerParams := by
      -- `rotproj_outer_unit` is `ContDiff`, hence differentiable
      have hc : ContDiff ℝ 2 (rotproj_outer_unit P pc.w) := by
        exact rotation_partials_exist_outer (S := P) (S_nonzero := by
          have : 0 < ‖P‖ := by
            have := pc.norm_S_gt_zero
            simpa using this
          exact this)
      exact (hc.differentiableAt (by norm_num)).mono (by
        intro x hx; exact hx)
    -- finish by unfolding and using simp
    unfold nth_partial rotproj_outer_unit
    simp [rotproj_outer_unit, rotM, rotM_mat, inner, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm])

simpa [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit] using
    (partials_helper0 (pbar := pbar) (ε := ε) (poly := poly)
      (pc := { S := P, S_in_poly := pc.S_in_poly, w := pc.w, w_unit := pc.w_unit, exceeds := pc.exceeds }))

have h := pc.fu_pose_eq_outer (p := pbar) P
  simp [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit] at h
  have h' : (rotproj_outer_unit P pc.w pbar.outerParams) = ⟪pc.w, pbar.outer P⟫ / ‖P‖ := by
    rfl
  -- use the definition of rotproj_outer_unit and the chain rule via the known derivative of rotM₂
  have hdiff : DifferentiableAt ℝ (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams := by
    -- follows from rotation_partials_exist_outer
    have : ContDiff ℝ 2 (rotproj_outer_unit P pc.w) :=
      rotation_partials_exist_outer (S := P) (w := pc.w) (by
        have : 0 < ‖P‖ := by
          -- this is only used to avoid division by zero; if ‖P‖=0 the goal is trivial
          by_contra h0
          have : ‖P‖ = 0 := le_antisymm (le_of_not_gt h0) (norm_nonneg P)
          have : P = 0 := norm_eq_zero.mp this
          subst this
          simp [nth_partial]
        exact this)
    exact (this.differentiableAt (by decide))
  -- reduce nth_partial to fderiv along basis vector
  simp [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit] at *
  -- the derivative of ⟪rotM (x0) (x1) P, w⟫ / ‖P‖ wrt x0 at outerParams is ⟪rotM₂θ P, w⟫ / ‖P‖
  -- so multiplying by ‖P‖ gives the desired result.
  have : (fderiv ℝ (fun x : ℝ² => ⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫ / ‖P‖) pbar.outerParams)
        (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1)
      = ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ / ‖P‖ := by
    -- unfold and apply existing simp/derivative lemmas for rotM₂θ packaged in Pose
    -- `simp` knows `nth_partial` for these rotation maps in this development
    simp [Pose.outerParams, Pose.outer, outerProj, PoseLike.outer]
  -- finish
  have hP : ‖P‖ ≠ 0 := by
    by_contra h0
    have : P = 0 := norm_eq_zero.mp (by simpa using h0)
    subst this
    simp [nth_partial]
  field_simp [this, hP]
  simp [real_inner_comm]

have hP : ‖P‖ = 0 ∨ ‖P‖ ≠ 0 := eq_or_ne ‖P‖ 0
  rcases hP with hP0 | hP0
  · simp [hP0]
  · have hPpos : 0 < ‖P‖ := lt_of_le_of_ne (norm_nonneg P) (Ne.symm hP0)
    have hPne : ‖P‖ ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hPpos
    have h :
        (fderiv ℝ (rotproj_outer_unit P pc.w) pbar.outerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1) =
          ‖P‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ := by
      change (fderiv ℝ (fun x => rotproj_outer_unit P pc.w x) _) _ = _
      unfold rotproj_outer_unit rotM
      convert_to
          (fderiv ℝ (‖P‖⁻¹ • (fun x : ℝ² => ⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫)) pbar.outerParams)
              (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1) =
            ‖P‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ := by
        conv =>
          lhs
          congr
          · ext x
            simp [Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul, inv_mul_eq_div, rotproj_outer_unit, rotM]
          · rfl
      have hf : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun x : ℝ² => ⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫) pbar.outerParams := by
        refine DifferentiableAt.inner ℝ ?_ (by fun_prop)
        have : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun x : ℝ² => rotM (x 0) (x 1) P) pbar.outerParams := by
          simp [rotM, rotM_mat]
          fun_prop
        simpa using this
      rw [(hf.hasFDerivAt.const_smul ‖P‖⁻¹).fderiv]
      simp only [Fin.isValue, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_smul', Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul]
      have hrot :
          (fderiv ℝ (fun x : ℝ² => ⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫) pbar.outerParams)
              (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1) =
            ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ := by
        -- `nth_partial` is computed using `EuclideanSpace.single 0 1`
        -- and `rotM₂θ` is exactly the partial derivative in that direction.
        simpa [Pose.outerParams, nth_partial] using (by
          simpa [nth_partial] : True)
      simpa [hrot, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]
    have : nth_partial 0 (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams =
        ‖P‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ := by
      simpa [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer] using h
    simp [this, hPne, mul_assoc]

have h := pc.fu_pose_eq_outer (p := pbar) (P := P)
  have h' :
      nth_partial 0 (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams * ‖P‖ =
        ⟪pc.w, pbar.outer P⟫ := by
    simpa [mul_comm, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer] using h
  have h'' :=
    partials_helper0 (pbar := pbar) (ε := ε) (poly := poly)
      (pc := (by
        classical
        exact
          { S := P
            S_in_poly := by
              simpa using pc.S_in_poly
            w := pc.w
            w_unit := pc.w_unit
            exceeds := by
              simpa using pc.exceeds }))
  simpa [mul_comm, real_inner_comm] using h'

have hne : (‖P‖ : ℝ) ≠ 0 := by
    by_contra h
    have : (P : ℝ³) = 0 := by simpa using norm_eq_zero.mp h
    simpa [this] using (show (⟪pbar.rotM₂θ (0 : ℝ³), pc.w⟫ : ℝ) = 0 by simp)
  have hdiff : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun x ↦ ⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫) pbar.outerParams := by
    fun_prop
  have hfd :
      HasFDerivAt (fun x ↦ ⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫)
        (fun _dx ↦ ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫) pbar.outerParams := by
    simpa [Pose.outerParams, Pose.rotM₂θ] using (pbar.hasFDerivAt_inner_rotM₂θ (P := P) (w := pc.w))
  have hfd2 :
      HasFDerivAt (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc)
        (‖P‖⁻¹ • (fun _dx ↦ ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫)) pbar.outerParams := by
    have : (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) =
        fun x ↦ (⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫) / ‖P‖ := by
      rfl
    simp [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, inv_mul_eq_div] at this
    simpa [this, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc] using (hfd.mul_const (‖P‖)⁻¹)
  have :
      nth_partial 0 (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams =
        ‖P‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ := by
    simp [nth_partial, hfd2.fderiv, hdiff, Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul, mul_assoc]
  simp [this, mul_assoc, hne, inv_mul_cancel, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]

have hP : ‖P‖ ≠ 0 := by
    by_contra h
    have : P = 0 := by simpa [norm_eq_zero] using h
    simp [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, this, nth_partial]
  have hdiff : DifferentiableAt ℝ (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams := by
    have : Differentiable ℝ (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) := by
      simp [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit]
      fun_prop
    exact this.differentiableAt
  simp [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, real_inner_comm, mul_assoc,
    mul_left_comm, mul_comm, hdiff.hasFDerivAt.fderiv, hP]

classical
  have hP : (0 : ℝ) ≤ ‖P‖ := norm_nonneg P
  by_cases hP0 : ‖P‖ = 0
  · have hP' : P = 0 := norm_eq_zero.mp hP0
    subst hP'
    simp [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, nth_partial]
  · have hP0' : ‖P‖ ≠ 0 := hP0
    have h : ‖P‖ * nth_partial 0 (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams * ‖P‖ =
        ⟪pc.w, pbar.outer P⟫ := by
      simpa [mul_assoc, pc.fu_pose_eq_outer pbar P] using congrArg (fun t => t * ‖P‖)
        (pc.fu_pose_eq_outer (p := pbar) (P := P))
    have hderiv :
        HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ³ => ⟪pc.w, pbar.outer P⟫) (⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫) pbar.outerParams := by
      simpa [real_inner_comm] using (pbar.hasDerivAt_outer_coord (P := P) (i := 0) pc.w)
    have hdiv :
        ‖P‖ * nth_partial 0 (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams =
        ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ := by
      have : nth_partial 0 (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams =
          ‖P‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ := by
        simpa [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, nth_partial, smul_eq_mul,
          inv_mul_eq_div, real_inner_comm] using
          (partials_helper0a (pbar := pbar) (pc := pc) (S := P) (w := pc.w))
      field_simp [this, hP0', mul_assoc]
    exact hdiv

have hP : ‖P‖ ≠ 0 := by
    have : 0 < ‖P‖ := by simpa using poly.nontriv P (by
      simpa [GoodPoly.vertices] using pc.S_in_poly)
    exact ne_of_gt this
  have hdiff : DifferentiableAt ℝ (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams := by
    have : ContDiff ℝ 2 (rotproj_outer_unit P pc.w) := by
      refine rotation_partials_exist_outer (S := P) (w := pc.w) ?_
      have : 0 < ‖P‖ := by
        simpa using poly.nontriv P (by
          simpa [GoodPoly.vertices] using pc.S_in_poly)
      exact this
    exact (this.differentiableAt (by decide))
  simp only [nth_partial]
  have hfd :
      (fderiv ℝ (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams)
          (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1)
        = ‖P‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ := by
    change
        (fderiv ℝ (fun x => rotproj_outer_unit P pc.w x) pbar.outerParams)
            (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1)
          = _
    unfold rotproj_outer_unit rotM
    have hf : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun x : ℝ² => ⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫) pbar.outerParams := by
      fun_prop
    convert_to
        (fderiv ℝ (‖P‖⁻¹ • (fun x : ℝ² => ⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫)) pbar.outerParams)
            (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1)
          = _ := by
      · ext x
        simp [rotproj_outer_unit, rotM, inv_mul_eq_div, Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul]
    rw [(hf.hasFDerivAt.const_smul ‖P‖⁻¹).fderiv]
    simp [Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]
  have := hfd
  field_simp [hP] at this
  simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using this

simpa [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, nth_partial] using
    (partials_helper0 (pbar := pbar) (ε := ε) (poly := poly)
      (pc := (poly := poly) (p := pbar) (ε := ε) pc))

have h := pc.fu_pose_eq_outer (p := pbar) P
  have hdiff : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun x => pc.fu_outer P x * ‖P‖) pbar.outerParams := by
    have : DifferentiableAt ℝ (pc.fu_outer P) pbar.outerParams := by
      have hP : ‖P‖ > 0 := by
        have : (0:ℝ) < ‖P‖ := poly.nontriv P (by
          have : P ∈ poly.vertices := by
            simpa using pc.S_in_poly
          exact this)
        simpa using this
      have : ContDiff ℝ 2 (rotproj_outer_unit P pc.w) :=
        rotation_partials_exist_outer (S_nonzero := (by simpa using (lt_of_lt_of_le pc.norm_S_gt_zero pc.norm_S_le_one)))
      exact (this.differentiableAt (by decide))
    simpa [mul_assoc] using this.mul_const ‖P‖
  have hn :
      nth_partial 0 (fun x => pc.fu_outer P x * ‖P‖) pbar.outerParams =
        ‖P‖ * nth_partial 0 (pc.fu_outer P) pbar.outerParams := by
    simp [nth_partial, fderiv_mul_const]
  have :=
    congrArg (fun g => nth_partial 0 g pbar.outerParams) h
  simp [nth_partial, hn, mul_assoc] at this
  simpa [mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc] using this
simp [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, nth_partial, rotM]

have hP : ‖P‖ ≠ 0 := by
    by_cases h : P = 0
    · subst h; simpa using (by simp : (0:ℝ) ≠ 0)
    · exact norm_ne_zero_iff.mpr h
  have hdiff : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun x : ℝ² => ⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫) pbar.outerParams := by
    have : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun x : ℝ² => rotM (x 0) (x 1) P) pbar.outerParams := by
      simp [rotM, rotM_mat]
      fun_prop
    exact (DifferentiableAt.inner ℝ this (by fun_prop))
  have hder :
      (fderiv ℝ (fun x : ℝ² => ⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫) pbar.outerParams)
          (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1) = ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ := by
    simpa [Pose.outerParams, Pose.rotM₂θ, Pose.rotM₂, nth_partial] using
      (by
        have := (by
          simpa [nth_partial] using
            (by
              rw [nth_partial]
              rfl : True))
        )
  simp only [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit]
  have h0 :
      nth_partial 0 (fun x : ℝ² => ⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫ / ‖P‖) pbar.outerParams =
        (‖P‖)⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ := by
    have hne : (‖P‖ : ℝ) ≠ 0 := hP
    have : (fderiv ℝ (fun x : ℝ² => ⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫ / ‖P‖) pbar.outerParams)
        (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1)
        = (‖P‖)⁻¹ * (fderiv ℝ (fun x : ℝ² => ⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫) pbar.outerParams)
            (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1) := by
      have hf : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun x : ℝ² => ⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫) pbar.outerParams := hdiff
      simpa [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc] using
        ((hf.hasFDerivAt.const_mul (‖P‖)⁻¹).fderiv
          (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1))
    simpa [nth_partial] using (this.trans (by simp [hder, mul_assoc]))
  have : ‖P‖ * nth_partial 0 (fun x : ℝ² => ⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫ / ‖P‖) pbar.outerParams =
      ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ := by
    simp [h0, mul_assoc, hP]
  simpa [real_inner_comm] using this

have hP : (0:ℝ) ≠ ‖P‖ := by
    by_cases h : ‖P‖ = 0
    · simpa [h] using (one_ne_zero : (1:ℝ) ≠ 0)
    · exact h
  have hdiff : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun x => rotproj_outer_unit P pc.w x) pbar.outerParams := by
    have hS : (0:ℝ) < ‖P‖ := lt_of_le_of_ne (norm_nonneg _) (Ne.symm hP)
    have : ContDiff ℝ 2 (rotproj_outer_unit P pc.w) := rotation_partials_exist_outer (S := P) hS
    exact (this.differentiable (by decide)).differentiableAt
  have h0 :
      (fderiv ℝ (rotproj_outer_unit P pc.w) pbar.outerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1) =
        ‖P‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ := by
    change
      (fderiv ℝ (fun x => rotproj_outer_unit P pc.w x) _) _ = _
    unfold rotproj_outer_unit rotM
    conv =>
      lhs
      congr
      · ext x
        simp [rotproj_outer_unit, rotproj_outer_unit, smul_eq_mul, inv_mul_eq_div]
    have hf : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun x => ⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫) pbar.outerParams := by
      fun_prop
    rw [(hf.hasFDerivAt.const_smul ‖P‖⁻¹).fderiv]
    simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.coe_smul', Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul]
    have : (fderiv ℝ (fun x => ⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫) pbar.outerParams)
        (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1) = ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ := by
      simp [Pose.outerParams, Pose.outer, inner, rotM, rotM_mat, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail]
    simpa [mul_assoc] using congrArg (fun t => ‖P‖⁻¹ * t) this
  simp only [nth_partial, Fin.isValue] at *
  have := h0
  field_simp [hP] at this
  simpa [mul_assoc] using this

simp [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, nth_partial, rotprojRM, rotM, rotM_mat,
    inner, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail, Fin.isValue]

simpa [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit] using
    (partials_helper0 (pbar := pbar) (ε := ε) (poly := poly) (pc := pc))

have hP : 0 ≠ ‖P‖ := by
    have : 0 < ‖P‖ := by
      have : P ∈ poly.vertices := by
        simpa using pc.S_in_poly
      exact poly.nontriv P this
    exact ne_of_lt this
  have hdiff : DifferentiableAt ℝ (rotproj_outer_unit P pc.w) pbar.outerParams := by
    have : Differentiable ℝ (rotproj_outer_unit P pc.w) := by
      simp [rotproj_outer_unit, rotM, rotM_mat, inner]
      fun_prop
    exact this.differentiableAt
  simp only [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit]
  have :
      (fderiv ℝ (fun x : ℝ² => ⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫ / ‖P‖) pbar.outerParams)
          (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1) =
        ‖P‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ := by
    have hconst : (fun x : ℝ² => (‖P‖ : ℝ)) = fun _ : ℝ² => ‖P‖ := rfl
    have hdiv :
        (fun x : ℝ² => ⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫ / ‖P‖) =
          fun x : ℝ² => ‖P‖⁻¹ * ⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫ := by
      ext x
      simp [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]
    rw [hdiv]
    have hinner :
        HasFDerivAt (fun x : ℝ² => ⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫)
          (InnerProductSpace.toDual ℝ (ℝ²) pc.w |>.toContinuousLinearMap).comp
            (pbar.rotM₂' P) pbar.outerParams := by
      simpa [Pose.outerParams] using (HasFDerivAt.inner ℝ (pbar.hasFDerivAt_rotM₂ P) (hasFDerivAt_const pc.w _))
    have : HasFDerivAt (fun x : ℝ² => ‖P‖⁻¹ * ⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫)
        (‖P‖⁻¹ • (((InnerProductSpace.toDual ℝ (ℝ²) pc.w).toContinuousLinearMap).comp (pbar.rotM₂' P))) pbar.outerParams := by
      simpa [mul_comm, smul_eq_mul] using hinner.const_smul ‖P‖⁻¹
    rw [this.fderiv]
    simp [Pose.rotM₂θ, ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply, InnerProductSpace.toDual_apply]
  rw [this]
  field_simp [hP]

simpa [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit] using
    (partials_helper0 (pbar := pbar) (ε := ε) (poly := poly)
      (pc := (poly := poly) (pbar := pbar) (ε := ε)
        { S := P
          S_in_poly := pc.S_in_poly
          w := pc.w
          w_unit := pc.w_unit
          exceeds := pc.exceeds }))
simpa [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, nth_partial]

have hP : ‖P‖ ≠ 0 := by
    have : (0:ℝ) < ‖P‖ := by
      simpa using poly.nontriv P (by
        have : P ∈ poly.vertices := by
          simpa using (by
            have := pc.S_in_poly
            exact this)
        exact this)
    exact ne_of_gt this
  have hdiff : DifferentiableAt ℝ (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams := by
    have : ContDiff ℝ 2 (rotproj_outer_unit P pc.w) :=
      rotation_partials_exist_outer (S := P) (w := pc.w) (by
        have : (0:ℝ) < ‖P‖ := lt_of_le_of_ne' (le_of_eq rfl) (Ne.symm hP)
        exact this)
    exact (this.differentiable le_rfl).differentiableAt
  have h := (hdiff.hasFDerivAt.fderiv).symm
  simp [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, rotproj_outer_unit, rotproj_outer_unit] at *
  field_simp [hP]

classical
  have hP : ‖P‖ ≠ 0 := by
    have : (0:ℝ) < ‖P‖ := by
      simpa using (poly.nontriv P (by
        have : P ∈ poly.vertices := by
          simpa using pc.S_in_poly
        exact this))
    exact ne_of_gt this
  have hfd :
      HasFDerivAt (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc)
        (‖P‖⁻¹ • (EuclideanSpace.single 0 ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫
              + EuclideanSpace.single 1 ⟪pbar.rotM₂φ P, pc.w⟫))
        pbar.outerParams := by
    sorry
  have :
      nth_partial 0 (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams =
        ‖P‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ := by
    simp [nth_partial, hfd.fderiv, ContinuousLinearMap.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul,
      EuclideanSpace.single_apply, Fin.isValue]
  simp [this, mul_assoc, hP, inv_mul_eq_div, mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_add, mul_smul]

have hP : 0 ≠ ‖P‖ := by
    have : 0 < ‖P‖ := by
      simpa using poly.nontriv P (by
        have : P ∈ poly.vertices := by
          simpa using pc.S_in_poly
        exact this)
    exact ne_of_lt this
  have hP' : ‖P‖ ≠ 0 := by simpa [ne_eq] using hP
  have hPpos : ‖P‖ > 0 := lt_of_le_of_ne (norm_nonneg P) (Ne.symm hP')
  have h :=
    (pc.fu_pose_eq_outer (p := pbar) P)
  have hder :
      nth_partial 0 (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams =
        ‖P‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ := by
    have : ContDiff ℝ 2 (rotproj_outer_unit P pc.w) := by
      simpa [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer] using rotation_partials_exist_outer (S := P) hPpos (w := pc.w)
    simpa [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, nth_partial] using
      (partials_helper0a (pbar := pbar) (ε := ε) (poly := poly) (pc := pc))
  simp [hder, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, hP']

have hP : ‖P‖ ≠ 0 := by
    have : (0:ℝ) < ‖P‖ := by simpa using poly.nontriv P (by simpa using pc.S_in_poly)
    exact ne_of_gt this
  have hdiff :
      DifferentiableAt ℝ (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams := by
    have : ContDiff ℝ 2 (rotproj_outer_unit P pc.w) := by
      refine rotation_partials_exist_outer (S := P) (w := pc.w) ?_
      exact lt_of_le_of_ne (by exact le_of_lt (by
        have : (0:ℝ) < ‖P‖ := by simpa using poly.nontriv P (by simpa using pc.S_in_poly)
        exact this)) (Ne.symm hP)
    exact (this.differentiableAt (by decide))
  have hderiv :
      (fderiv ℝ (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1) =
        ‖P‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ := by
    change (fderiv ℝ (fun x => rotproj_outer_unit P pc.w x) _) _ = _
    unfold GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer rotproj_outer_unit rotM
    convert_to
        (fderiv ℝ (‖P‖⁻¹ • fun x : ℝ² => ⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫) pbar.outerParams)
          (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1) =
        ‖P‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ := by
      · rfl
    have hrot : HasFDerivAt (fun x : ℝ² => rotM (x 0) (x 1) P) (pbar.rotM₂CLM P) pbar.outerParams := by
      simpa using pbar.hasFDerivAt_rotM₂ P
    have hinn :
        HasFDerivAt (fun x : ℝ² => ⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫)
          ((InnerProductSpace.toDual ℝ (ℝ²) pc.w).comp (pbar.rotM₂CLM P)) pbar.outerParams := by
      simpa [real_inner_comm] using
        (HasFDerivAt.inner ℝ hrot (hasFDerivAt_const pc.w pbar.outerParams))
    have := (hdiff.hasFDerivAt.const_smul ‖P‖⁻¹)
    rw [this.fderiv]
    simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.coe_smul', Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul]
    have : (fderiv ℝ (fun x : ℝ² => ⟪rotM (x 0) (x 1) P, pc.w⟫) pbar.outerParams)
              (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1) =
            ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ := by
      simpa using congrArg (fun T => T (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1)) (hinn.fderiv)
    simp [nth_partial, this]
  simp [nth_partial, hderiv, mul_assoc, hP, inv_mul_eq_iff_eq_mul₀, mul_comm, mul_left_comm]
